message.content:
Update these component files to replace the amber/yellow color scheme with a deep purple/metallic theme:
1. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\components\CategoryCard.tsx
2. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\components\RecommendationCard.tsx
3. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\components\GenerationModal.tsx
4. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\components\AICitationPreview.tsx
5. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\components\SourceOfTruthModal.tsx
6. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\i18n\LanguageSelector.tsx

Rules for each file:
- Read each file first
- Replace ALL occurrences of these color patterns:
  - `#fbbf24` → `#a855f7`
  - `#d97706` → `#7c3aed`
  - `#f59e0b` → `#c084fc`
  - `amber-*` classes → `purple-*`
  - `emerald-500` → `purple-400`, `emerald-400` → `purple-300`
  - `text-black` on primary backgrounds → `text-white`
  - `bg-white text-black` buttons → `bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white`
  - `bg-[#09090b]` → `bg-[#0c0815]`
  - `bg-[#0a0a0f]` → `bg-[#050208]`
  - `bg-white/5` → `bg-purple-500/5`

Do NOT change any functionality, only colors/styling.

content.text: I'll read all six files first, then apply the color changes systematically.
